title: Vaccine Cold Chain
script_summary: Exploring the critical science behind vaccine cold chain logistics.

segments.voiceover: Science has a clearer story about vaccine cold chain than social media does.
The vaccine cold chain is the journey of vaccines from the manufacturer to your arm.
Every step, from storage to transportation, must maintain specific temperatures to ensure effectiveness.
Studies show that even a slight temperature change can reduce a vaccine's potency.
That’s why the cold chain is critical—without it, we risk lives.
Stay informed about vaccine logistics. Like and follow for more science insights.
